---
title: "Caroline Ray"
---

## Caroline Ray

**Dates:** (b. Bishopstoke 1852/3)

### Description

sister of [[person:2111]Charles Ray]

### Biography

She was keeping the Otterbourne shop at the time of the 1901 census, and living with her father, also Charles Ray, 73.

### Letters

- [To Catharine Elgie, March 15 [1898]](../letters/3373_To_Catharine_Elgie.html)

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
